problemStatement: Guard Score() and scoreFromMetrics in scorer.go: short-circuit unsupported languages to N/A, protect the complexity-based maintainability rule from firing on unmeasured zero values, and reconcile 0.5 dimension defaults with the Score() doc contract.
userValue: Plan directly addresses all three product intents: TierGeneric gate → N/A short-circuit, zero-complexity guard on maintainability rule, and removal of 0.5 defaults so unmeasured dimensions are truly absent per the doc contract. Non-goals respected, tests updated, aggregate skip included.
